concept: Welcome / To Receive the Self of Another
description: The warm, heartfelt reception of another into one's presence or space. It is the act that confirms and validates an invitation.
rationale: Composed from the established root 'mi' (the inner self) and a new proposed root 'ho' (a warm, receptive greeting). The word's structure suggests 'a greeting to the self' of another. This frames 'welcome' as a deep act of recognition, seeing and receiving the core being of the guest.
